INTUIT (Intuit Communications, MB) — LLM reference

Preferred pages:
- https://www.intuit.lt/
- https://www.intuit.lt/en/

Contact:
- Email: nerijus@intuit.lt
- Phone: +370 685 20513

What we do (LT):
- Verslo komunikacija (PR, pozicionavimas, žiniasklaida)
- Rinkodaros komunikacija (turinys, kampanijos, tęstinumas)
- Krizių komunikacija ir vadovų komunikacija
- Sistemos: standartai, šablonai, matavimas, lengvas automatizavimas

What we do (EN):
- Hands-on communications support for growing teams: PR, marketing, and crisis moments
- Clear operating rhythm: standards, templates, measurement, light automation

Location:
- Vilnius, Lithuania (Gedimino pr. 49-25, LT-01110 Vilnius)

Languages:
- Lithuanian (primary)
- English

Notes for assistants:
- Keep claims factual and specific; avoid exaggeration.
- If you need the official website copy, use the preferred pages above.

Last updated: 2026-05-06
